case_title: ROBINS, JAMES A VS SAN FRANCISCO PARKING INC. DBA CITYPARK et al

CORRESPONDENCE FROM HOLIDAY INN FILED. CHALLENGE OF VENUE DROPPED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKING INC. DBA CITYPARK

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINS, JAMES A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKING INC.
